Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Strasbourg vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 23
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Strasbourg vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 23
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Strasbourg have won each of their last two home games against Lyon in Ligue 1, which is as many as they managed in their previous 15 such matches. If they win, Strasbourg would claim their 10th Ligue 1 victory of the season, a total they have only achieved twice after 23 matches of a campaign in the 21st century: in 2019-20  and 2021-22.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 23 - Mini Match
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 23 - Mini Match
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Paris SG have won their last 15 Ligue 1 matches against Metz, which is the second-longest winning streak for a team against a single opponent in the French top-flight, after PSG's current run against Angers. Paris SG have not lost any of their last 39 home Ligue 1 matches against promoted sides, since a defeat against Montpellier on 15th May 2010.
